zh.lifeSummary: 當Percival Leavitt I於大約1552年出生在英國艾可艾爾姆斯亞德時，他的母親Maria Sharott21歲，父親William Leavitt25歲。他和Elizabeth Rotherforth至少有3個兒子和3個女兒。他去世於1625年在英國越可爾約克享年74歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭越可爾約克。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Percival Leavitt I于大约1552年出生在英国艾可艾爾姆斯亞德时，他的母亲Maria Sharott21岁，父亲William Leavitt25岁。他和Elizabeth Rotherforth至少有3个儿子和3个女儿。他去世于1625年在英国越可爾約克享年74岁，埋葬在英国英格兰越可爾約克。

nameMeanings.name: Leavitt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Anglo-Norman French leuet ‘wolf cub’ (see Low 3).
habitational name from any of various places in Normandy called Livet. All are of obscure, presumably Gaulish, etymology.

variants.name: Low
meanings: English and Scottish: topographic name for someone who lived near a tumulus, mound or hill, Middle English lowe, from Old English hlāw (see Law 2).

Scottish and English: nickname for a short man, from Middle English lah, lowe (Old Norse lágr; the word was adopted first into the northern dialects of Middle English, where Scandinavian influence was strong, and then spread south, with regular alteration of the vowel quality).

English and Scottish (of Norman origin): nickname for a violent or dangerous person, from Anglo-Norman French lou, leu ‘wolf’ (from Latin lupus). Wolves were relatively common in Britain at the time when most surnames were formed, as there still existed large tracts of uncleared forest.

variants.name: Levitt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Hyman, Isador, Isadore, Ari, Batya, Hersh, Mayer, Meyer, Rina.

nameMeanings.name: Percival
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French versions of the Arthurian legend, where the name is spelled Perceval. According to Chrétien de Troyes (12th century) and Wolfram von Eschenbach ( c.1170–1220 ), Perceval (German Parzifal) was the perfectly pure and innocent knight who alone could succeed in the quest for the Holy Grail (a cup or bowl with supernatural powers, which in medieval legend was identified with the chalice that had received Christ's blood at the Crucifixion). Later versions of the Grail legend assign this role to Sir Galahad . The name Perceval probably represents a drastic remodelling of the Celtic name Peredur, as if from Old French perce(r) ‘pierce’ + val ‘valley’. This may well have been influenced by Percy , which was similarly analysed as a compound of perce(r) ‘pierce’ + haie ‘hedge’.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Percival Leavitt I was born about 1552, in Elmstead, Essex, England, his mother, Maria Sharott, was 21 and his father, William Leavitt, was 25. He had at least 3 sons and 3 daughters with Elizabeth Rotherforth. He died in 1625, in York, Yorkshire, England, at the age of 74, and was buried in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Percival Leavitt I est né environ 1552, à Elmstead, Essex, Angleterre, sa mère, Maria Sharott, avait 21 ans et son père, William Leavitt, avait 25 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles avec Elizabeth Rotherforth. Il est décédé en 1625, à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, à l’âge de 74 ans, et a été enterré à York, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Percival Leavitt I um 1552 in Elmstead, Essex, England geboren wurde, war seine Mutter Maria Sharott 21 und sein Vater William Leavitt 25. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Rotherforth mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1625 im Alter von 74 Jahren in York, Yorkshire, England und wurde in York, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Percival Leavitt I è nato il circa 1552 nel Elmstead, Essex, England, il suo madre, Maria Sharott, aveva 21 anni e il suo padre, William Leavitt, aveva 25 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie con Elizabeth Rotherforth. Morì nel 1625, nel York, Yorkshire, England, all'età di 74 anni, e fu sepolto a York, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Percival Leavitt Iが約1552年にイギリスエセックスエルムステアドで生まれた時，母Maria Sharottは21歳，父William Leavittは25歳であった。彼はElizabeth Rotherforthとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘をもうけた。彼は1625年にイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークで74歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアヨークにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Percival Leavitt I(이)가 대략 1552년 영국 에세스 엘스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 어머니 Maria Sharott(은)는 21세였고, 그의 아버지 William Leavitt(은)는 25세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Rotherforth(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1625년 영국 요르크실르 요르크에서 74세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Percival Leavitt I nasceu aproximadamente 1552, em Elmstead, Essex, Inglaterra, sua mãe, Maria Sharott, tinha 21 anos e seu pai, William Leavitt, tinha 25 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas com Elizabeth Rotherforth. Ele faleceu em 1625, em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, com 74 anos, e foi sepultado em York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Percival Leavitt I родился около 1552 г. в местности элмстид, эссекс, Англия, его матери по имени Maria Sharott было 21 год, а отцу, которого звали William Leavitt, 25. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери от Elizabeth Rotherforth. Он умер в 1625 г. в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия в возрасте 74 лет и был похоронен в местности ерк, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Percival Leavitt I nació aproximadamente 1552, en Elmstead, Essex, Inglaterra, su mamá, Maria Sharott, tenía 21 años y su papá, William Leavitt, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas con Elizabeth Rotherforth. Murió en 1625, en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 74 años, y fue sepultado en York, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
